config.name: Evolution Forbidden: Survival Without Adaptation
config.hypothesis: Without mutation (base_rate=0.0), civilizations lose resilience under catastrophe pressure — collapse rates increase relative to the standard catastrophe resilience experiment, proving that adaptation is a necessary survival mechanism

findings: Collapse rate WITHOUT evolution: 0% at peaceful (0.0) vs 0% at extreme (0.03)
Mean survival (no evolution): 500.0 epochs at peaceful vs 500.0 at extreme catastrophe
Total trait mutations across all worlds: 0 (expected: 0)
Mean fitness (frozen traits): 0.5311 at peaceful vs 0.5617 at extreme catastrophe
Mean population (no evolution): 48.5 at peaceful vs 46.6 at extreme
Mean catastrophe deaths at extreme rate (no evolution): 12.4
